caveat: Tiny hand-built reference set; BLEU is brittle on short text, chrF reported alongside. Indicative only.

examples.source: I love this car. It is comfortable and reliable.
examples.hypothesis: Me encanta este coche. Es cómodo y confiable.

examples.source: The car broke down after a week. Terrible experience.
examples.hypothesis: El coche se averió después de una semana, una experiencia terrible.

examples.source: Great fuel economy and a smooth ride for the whole family.
examples.hypothesis: Gran ahorro de combustible y un viaje suave para toda la familia.

examples.source: The dealership service was slow and the staff were unhelpful.
examples.hypothesis: El servicio de concesionarios era lento y el personal no ayudaba.
